pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities despite Solidity 0.8+ safeguards. SWC-107 fits because the contract exhibits multiple access control flaws, including unauthorized state-changing functions. Evidence: Finding 4 confirms integer overflow/underflow issues in arithmetic operations; Finding 6 reports insufficient access control measures across the contract; Finding 7 identifies missing access controls on critical state-changing functions
